description:
Easy Quality Assurance and Terminology

ApSIC Xbench provides simple and powerful Quality Assurance and Terminology Management in a single package. Just load files in any of the dozens of CAT formats supported and get your translation quality to the next level.
- Added support for memoQ 11.5, 11.6, 12.0, 12.1, and 12.2
- Improved loading of Excel .xlsx files
- Improved loading of entities in TMX files
- Fixed issue with invalid filenames in the Phrase Connector
- Fixed wrong column width in Search with large fonts
- Fixed loading of Wordfast files
- Fixed loading of .glo files
- Fixed loading of Matecat files from Chrome extension
- Fixed checklist sorting
- Bug and stability fixes
